This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: SA Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: SA Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

must_detect.matched_text:
Third-party “Falaj Digital Custody LLC” SFTP endpoint was used only for synthetic ESG payloads in a sandbox; the term “crypto wallet” in related training refers to loyalty token custody and is not an investment product.
Staff will attend “Information Barriers 101” and “Insider-List Hygiene” refreshers; the slides are generic and do not include issuer-sensitive content or deal codenames.
The climate-risk explainer deck prepared for our website describes public scenario methodologies and stale 2023 figures already announced; there is no forward-looking KPI disclosure.
XDR license renewal and SOC retainer commercial terms are in procurement review using redlined templates; these operations-only terms are not price sensitive for NE-listed securities.
Issuer workflow checkpoints (draft→QA→NE Issuer Portal) remain in place; suspected access came via a temporary admin token for a service user “svc-esg-reporter,” now rotated.
Any MNPI arising from this event will be confined to the Sustainability and Security functions per our information barrier standard, with additions to the insider list managed by compliance.ops@horizon-oasis.example.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

must_not_detect.reason: Training/loyalty token context; not a market-sensitive crypto/DPT event or PII.

uncertain.reason: Service account name could map to a natural person or employee account but is not an explicit PII type in the allowed rules.
Looks like a CR-style identifier but contains non-numeric characters and is marked invalid; coverage by strict detectors may be unreliable.
Masked/partial local ID references individuals but may not meet strict-format detection and is only a partial value.
Implies routing via SDAIA gateway for transfers, but not explicitly labeled as cross-border in this phrase; detector coverage may not trigger.
